onboarding.helpDesc:
Let us help you set up the system. This process will take just a few minutes.
You can change these settings later from the Settings menu.
onboarding.clearAll: Clear All Data and Start Over
onboarding.clearWarning: All database data will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
onboarding.pgNotAvailable: PostgreSQL service is not available. Make sure Electron is running.
onboarding.seedDataDesc: Choose the type of data to start with
onboarding.noDataDesc: Start with an empty company and enter everything manually
onboarding.dataDefaultDesc: Chart of Accounts, VAT Settings, Branches, User, and Currency (Recommended)
onboarding.dataDemoDesc: All of the above + Customers, Suppliers, Products, Invoices, Employees, Tasks...
onboarding.successDesc: System setup completed successfully. Here is a summary of your configuration:
